title: Biosensing garment and method
abstract: Biosensing garment (100) comprises a garment (103) and an inner biosensing textile (200) disposed within the garment (103). The inner biosensing textile (200) comprises: a textile panel (201); and an electronic component (221) positioned on the textile panel (201)). The garment (103) further comprises an access region (113) at a location corresponding to the location of the electronic component (221) on the textile panel (201). The access region (113) is arranged such that at least a part of the electronic component (221) is visible on an outside surface of the garment (103).
claims: Claims 1 . A biosensing garment comprising: a garment; an inner biosensing textile disposed within the garment, the inner biosensing textile comprises: a textile panel; an electronic component positioned on the textile panel, wherein the garment further comprises an access region at a location corresponding to the location of the electronic component on the textile panel, wherein the access region is arranged such that at least a part of the electronic component is visible on an outside surface of the garment. 2. A biosensing garment as claimed in claim 1 , wherein the inner biosensing textile comprises a biosensing unit positioned on an inner surface of the textile panel for measuring a biosignal of a wearer of the garment. 3. A biosensing garment as claimed in claim 2, wherein the biosensing unit comprises an electrode. 4. A biosensing garment as claimed in claim 2 to 3, wherein the electronic component is positioned on an outer surface of the textile panel facing the garment. 5. A biosensing garment as claimed in claim 4, wherein the electronic component is connected to the biosensing unit through the textile panel. 6 A biosensing garment as claimed in claim 5, wherein the electronic component is wirelessly connected to the biosensing unit. 7. A biosensing garment as claimed in claim 5, wherein the electronic component is conductively connected to the biosensing unit. 8. A biosensing garment as claimed in any preceding claim, wherein the access region is an aperture, transparent region or translucent region on the garment. 9. A biosensing garment as claimed in any preceding claim, wherein the electronic component comprises a power source. 10. A biosensing garment as claimed in any preceding claim, wherein the electronic component comprises a controller. 1 1 . A biosensing garment as claimed in any preceding claim, wherein the electronic component comprises an indicator arranged to indicate a status of the electronic component. 12. A biosensing garment as claimed in any preceding claim, wherein the electronics component is removable from the textile panel. 13. A biosensing garment as claimed in any preceding claim, wherein the textile panel comprises a holder for receiving the electronic component., optionally wherein the holder is arranged to releasably hold the electronic component. 14. A biosensing garment as claimed in any preceding claim, wherein the biosensing textile comprises a gripper section, wherein the gripper section is provided on the underside surface of the biosensing textile and is arranged to grip the biosensing textile to a skin surface of a wearer of the garment. 15. A method of manufacturing a garment, the method comprises: providing a garment; providing an inner biosensing textile, the inner biosensing textile comprises a textile panel, the inner biosensing textile comprises an electronic component positioned on the textile panel, the garment further comprises an access region at a location corresponding to the location of the electronic component on the textile panel, the access region is arranged such that at least a part of the electronic component is visible on an outside surface of the garment; disposing the inner biosensing textile within the garment; and attaching the inner biosensing textile to the garment.
